title: crotalaria nayaritensis
intro: Crotalaria nayaritensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to the tropical regions of Mexico. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria nayaritensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, the roots of the plant are prepared as a decoction or infusion and used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
